revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore]][[en:Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore]][[ja:埼玉県立歴史と民俗の博物館]][[ko:사이타마 현립 역사민속박물관]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11248611]] Wikidata name: Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Use dmy dates|date=November 2019}} {{Infobox building | name = Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore | native_name = 埼玉県立歴史と民俗の博物館 | image = [[File:Saitama-rekimin2006 0715.jpg|150px]] | caption = | cost = | owner = | address = 4-219 Takahana-chō, Ōmiya-ku | location_town = [[:en:Saitama, Saitama|Saitama]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]] | location_country = [[:en:Japan|Japan]] | coordinates = {{coord|35|55|16|N|139|37|48|E|display=title,inline|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000}} | opened_date = 1971 | inauguration_date = | renovation_date = | demolition_date = | destruction_date = | other_dimensions = | floor_count = | floor_area = | architect = | architecture_firm = | website = [http://www.saitama-rekimin.spec.ed.jp/ homepage] }}
{{nihongo|'''Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore'''|埼玉県立歴史と民俗の博物館|Saitama Kenritsu Rekishi to Minzoku no Hakubutsukan}} is a [[:en:Prefectural museum|Prefectural museum]] in [[:en:Saitama, Saitama|Saitama]], Japan, dedicated to the history and folklore of [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. The museum opened in 1971.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.saitama-rekimin.spec.ed.jp/?page_id=55 |script-title=ja:館紹介 |trans-title=Introduction |language=Japanese |publisher=Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore |accessdate=21 August 2013}}</ref>
==See also== * [[:en:Chichibu Province|Chichibu Province]] * [[:en:Musashi Province|Musashi Province]] * [[:en:List of Historic Sites of Japan (Saitama)|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Saitama)]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)|List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)]]
==References== {{Reflist}}
==External links== * {{in lang|ja}} [http://www.saitama-rekimin.spec.ed.jp/ Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore] * [https://artsandculture.google.com/partner/saitama-prefectural-museum-of-history-and-folklore Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore at Google Cultural Institute]
{{Authority control}}
{{Japan-museum-stub}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Museums in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Saitama (city)]] [[Category:History museums in Japan]] [[Category:Prefectural museums]] [[Category:Museums established in 1971]] [[Category:1971 establishments in Japan]] [[Category:Saitama Prefecture designated tangible cultural property]] [[Category:Organizations based in Saitama (city)]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore'''|埼玉県立歴史と民俗の博物館|Saitama Kenritsu Rekishi to Minzoku no Hakubutsukan}} is a [[:en:Prefectural museum|Prefectural museum]] in [[:en:Saitama, Saitama|Saitama]], Japan, dedicated to the history and folklore of [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. The museum opened in 1971.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.saitama-rekimin.spec.ed.jp/?page_id=55 |script-title=ja:館紹介 |trans-title=Introduction |language=Japanese |publisher=Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore |accessdate=21 August 2013}}</ref>
==See also== * [[:en:Chichibu Province|Chichibu Province]] * [[:en:Musashi Province|Musashi Province]] * [[:en:List of Historic Sites of Japan (Saitama)|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Saitama)]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)|List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)]]
==References== {{Reflist}}
==External links== * {{in lang|ja}} [http://www.saitama-rekimin.spec.ed.jp/ Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore] * [https://artsandculture.google.com/partner/saitama-prefectural-museum-of-history-and-folklore Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore at Google Cultural Institute]
{{Authority control}}

{{nihongo|'''Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore'''|埼玉県立歴史と民俗の博物館|Saitama Kenritsu Rekishi to Minzoku no Hakubutsukan}} is a [[:en:Prefectural museum|Prefectural museum]] in [[:en:Saitama, Saitama|Saitama]], Japan, dedicated to the history and folklore of [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. The museum opened in 1971.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.saitama-rekimin.spec.ed.jp/?page_id=55 |script-title=ja:館紹介 |trans-title=Introduction |language=Japanese |publisher=Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore |accessdate=21 August 2013}}</ref>
==See also== * [[:en:Chichibu Province|Chichibu Province]] * [[:en:Musashi Province|Musashi Province]] * [[:en:List of Historic Sites of Japan (Saitama)|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Saitama)]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)|List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)]]
==References== {{Reflist}}

{{nihongo|'''Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore'''|埼玉県立歴史と民俗の博物館|Saitama Kenritsu Rekishi to Minzoku no Hakubutsukan}} is a {{ill|Prefectural museum|en|Prefectural museum|WD=Q4409567|lt=Prefectural museum}} in [[:en:Saitama, Saitama|Saitama]], Japan, dedicated to the history and folklore of {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}.
